creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
Yorick is a scientific oriented language (much like Matlab).
It can use X11 and is very fast.

Fix: 

As a side note: this is the first port I know of that actually depends
on FreeBSD's SIGFPE feature. Thanks to bde for keeping this feature; it
made the port much simpler !
How-To-Repeat: /pub/FreeBSD/incoming/yorick.tar.gz
